{{Quote|Your records don't include the Battle of Bogo Rai.|[[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], to [[Sneaky]]|<ref name="Dark Nest III: The Swarm War" />}}
The '''Battle of Bogo Rai''' was a famous battle fought by the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] at some point prior to the [[Swarm War]]. The Chiss forces deployed during the battle were noted for utilizing a space fleet to perform close ground support. This tactic was again used during the [[Battle of Tenupe]], after [[the Colony]] learned of the Battle of Bogo Rai from the [[Joiner]] [[Daer'ey'ath|ReyaTaat]], former Chiss [[Intelligence officer/Legends|intelligence officer]] Daer'ey'ath.<ref name="Dark Nest III: The Swarm War" /> It shared its name with the [[Bogo Rai system/Legends|Bogo Rai system]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
